1531707.title: Space pirate

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Science fiction character trope of space, rather than seafaring pirate

1531707.description: Science fiction character trope of space, rather than seafaring pirate
1531707.extract: Space pirates are a type of stock character from science fiction. A take on the traditional seafaring pirates of history or the fictional air pirates of the 19th century, space pirates travel through outer space. Where traditional pirates target sailing ships, space pirates serve a similar role in sci-fi media: they capture and plunder spacecraft for cargo, loot and occasionally steal spacecraft, and kill or enslave the crewmembers and passengers.
